features.name: trailing comma in module port list
features.description: Code should include a module port list with a trailing comma before the closing parenthesis, which is a syntax error
features.snippet: module RAM32X1D(output DPO, SPO, input D, WCLK, WE, input A0, A1, A2, A3, A4, input DPRA0, DPRA1, DPRA2, DPRA3, DPRA4,);
